name: Juggernaut
flavor: The offense discipline: a Sandow who never stops moving forward, turning every hit, shove, and thrown body into fuel for the next, bigger swing.

features.name: Unstoppable Force
features.description: You feed on the wreckage you cause. In addition to your baseline Grit generation, you gain 1 additional Grit the first time each turn you knock a creature prone (by a shove, a Heave throw, or any other means), and you gain 1 Grit the first time each turn you deal damage to a creature with a Heave throw — two separate sources, each capped at once per turn, exactly like your baseline Grit generation. The bigger the mess you make, the more you have left to make it worse.

features.name: Bulldozer Charge
features.description: When you move at least 15 feet in a straight line toward a creature and then hit it with a melee weapon attack before the end of the same turn, the attack deals an extra [[1d6]] bludgeoning damage, and the target must succeed on a Strength saving throw (DC = 8 + your proficiency bonus + your Strength modifier) or be knocked prone and pushed 5 feet directly away from you, your choice of direction. You can use Bulldozer Charge only once per turn.
